query: This repo got messy after several agent runs. Help me identify temporary files that can be cleaned up, but do not delete anything yet.
I need to free some space in this coding workspace. Please find old test outputs, caches, logs, and generated artifacts, but do a dry run first.
Clean up agent-generated logs and screenshots. Do not touch databases or .env files.
Before handoff, tidy the workspace and tell me which scratch files or eval outputs can be archived.
Disk usage in this workspace is getting high. Check node_modules, caches, temporary databases, and test reports, then tell me what can be archived.
Review this PR, focusing on security issues and regression risk.
Clean up memory.md by removing stale user preferences and duplicate notes.
Run the test suite and tell me whether the latest changes broke anything.
Fix this failing test. It probably changed because the API contract moved.
Reorganize the README and make the installation steps clearer.
Check git status and tell me what changed in the working tree.
Delete this unused function and update the corresponding tests.
This repo is messy and hard to understand. Review the architecture and suggest a cleaner module layout.
Before handoff, summarize what changed and what still needs work.
